introSection: Frutti Loop Coaster is a kiddie roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Poland. This coaster is longer than other SBF Visa Wacky Worm coasters.
fullText: Frutti Loop Coaster is a kiddie roller coaster located at Energylandia in Zator, Poland. This coaster is longer than other SBF Visa Wacky Worm coasters.
